title: Thai Shawarma
description: A fusion twist on the classic street food, blending Thai flavors with the warm spices of Shawarma. This dish is a delightful marriage of East meets Middle East.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together curry paste, fish sauce, and lime juice.
2. Add the lamb shawarma meat and mix until well coated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or overnight.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the lamb from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Transfer the lamb to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes.
7. Slice the lamb into thin strips.
8. Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
9. Add the sesame seeds and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
10. Add the sliced lamb and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
11. Garnish with fresh cilantro and Thai basil.
